message:
fix(codegen): Migrate assign_defer.zig to builder API

Migrated all 14 emit calls to ZigBuilder API:
- emitStringConcatDefer() → builder with flush
- emitArrayListDefer() → builder with flush
- emitListCompDefer() → builder with flush
- emitDictDefer() → builder with flush (complex, handles value cleanup)
- emitAllocatedStringDefer() → builder with flush

Key technique: For writeLocalVarName which requires a writer interface,
use b.body.writer(b.allocator) to get direct writer access to the
builder's body buffer. This allows mixing builder methods (writeIndent,
writeFmt) with writer-based utilities (writeLocalVarName).

Pattern used:
- const b = try self.getBuilder()
- try b.writeIndent(), try b.write(), try b.writeFmt()
- try zig_keywords.writeLocalVarName(b.body.writer(b.allocator), var_name)
- const output = b.getBody()
- try self.output.appendSlice(self.allocator, output)

Tests: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 ✅

Progress: 10/47 statement files migrated
